title: "The Lord Was With Joseph - Part 2" Genesis 39:7-19

notes.introduction: An exposition of Genesis 39:7-19 on Joseph's response to repeated sexual temptation and his subsequent false accusation by Potiphar's wife, the second part of a three-part series on Genesis 39. The passage is treated as a case study in resisting temptation, with supporting references to 1 Corinthians 10:13, Hebrews 13:4, and the contrasting examples of Judah (Genesis 38) and King David.

sections.heading: Review of Genesis 39 and Series Context
The Temptation Recorded: Initial and Repeated
Joseph's Refusal and Recognition of Sin Against God
Joseph Flees and the False Accusation
God at Work Through False Accusation and Imprisonment
